brand.name: Akaal Integrated Solutions
brand.vibe: Premium architectural, luxury tech, timeless, eternal, cinematic, expensive, high-end, reliable.

navbar.style: fixed w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/5

hero.style: relative min-h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden
hero.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-black/40 via-black/60 to-[#0A0A0A] z-10

bento_grid.wrapper: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 sm:gap-8
bento_grid.card: bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/5 p-8 sm:p-10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-white/15 hover:bg-zinc-900/80

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-medium px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-wide uppercase hover:bg-[#B3932D] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 font-medium px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-wide uppercase hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors

forms.input: bg-zinc-900 border-white/10 text-white rounded-none px-4 py-3 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] transition-all
forms.label: text-sm text-zinc-400 mb-2 block

images.description: Luxurious dining and living room with modern decor and ambient lighting - used for the main hero background.
Dome security cameras on a wall in dim lighting - used for the security service card.
High-tech server rack in a secure data center - used for the Data/Comm Cabling service card.
Man using a smart control panel for room settings in a luxury space - portfolio or smart home feature.
Minimalist classic hotel facade against dark dramatic sky - used as a background or visual break.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5, color zinc-400 for default, gold/champagne for active/hover states.

animation_rules.reveal: Framer Motion 'fade up' with slight y-axis translation (e.g., y: 30, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) on viewport enter, staggered for lists.
animation_rules.hover: Subtle scale-up (1.02) and border illumination for interactive bento cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a premium, single-page or multi-section marketing site matching the 'Akaal Integrated Solutions' luxury identity.
Avoid standard SaaS purple/blue gradients or generic 'tech' aesthetics. Rely strictly on the defined palette: Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A), Zinc/Slate grays, and Champagne Gold (#D4AF37) accents.
Use Lucide icons for services: Shield (Security), Home (Smart Home), Speaker/Tv (Audio-Visual), Network/Server (Data Cabling).
Construct a 'Tetris' bento grid for the 4 core services.
Ensure all contrast ratios pass APCA/WCAG AA.
The hero section must have a dark gradient overlay so text remains perfectly legible over the background image.
Integrate a Shadcn form in the Contact section with fields for Name, Email, Phone, Project Type, and Message. Display the phone number prominently.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
